title: You will not Rei in episode 23
display_title: You will not Rei in episode 23
wikitext:
[]: "You will not!"? Rei in episode 23             Quote Post by Duke » Fri Jan 30, 2009 5:46 pm In episode 24, while the angel is fusing with Unit 00, and it starts trying to fuse with unit 01, Rei says: "Is my mind and soul to become one with Ikari...?" "You will not!" *reverses AT field* What does she mean? That she will not allow the angel to harm Shinji? Also, she says: "If I leave unit 00, the AT field will cease to be... I will not let it." I morely understand that last one, but still, what does she mean by "You will not!"?

[]: Re: "You will not!"? Rei in episode 23             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Jan 30, 2009 5:49 pm Duke wrote: That she will not allow the angel to harm Shinji?

[]:             Quote Post by Another Asuka » Fri Jan 30, 2009 7:51 pm I think she was referring to Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Fri Jan 30, 2009 9:02 pm Another Asuka wrote: I think she was referring to Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Fri Jan 30, 2009 11:49 pm Another Asuka wrote: I think she was referring to Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 31, 2009 1:07 am Another Asuka wrote: I think she was referring to Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Another Asuka » Sat Jan 31, 2009 3:32 am Duke wrote: Another Asuka wrote: I think she was referring to Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 31, 2009 5:00 am Rei Ayanami III that was. The three Reis seemed to have different personalities. Rei I- Evil demonic toddler Rei II- An iconic tool Rei III- Self aware third impact tool.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sat Jan 31, 2009 9:10 am Yeah. She says it to the angel attacking Shinji, as the angel attacks Shinji. But I'm sure she was talking to Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat Jan 31, 2009 10:43 am In Japanese she says "Ikari-kun". She's talking about Shinji. Your honorific-fu is weak. (Gendo would be 'the Commander' or "ano hito", i.e. 'that person'...)

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sat Jan 31, 2009 12:08 pm There you go; nail in the "it was Gendo" coffin. /thread

[]: Re: "You will not!"? Rei in episode 23             Quote Post by Nukie » Sat Jan 31, 2009 1:21 pm Duke wrote: what does she mean by "You will not!"?

[]: Re: "You will not!"? Rei in episode 23             Quote Post by ZapX » Sat Jan 31, 2009 1:39 pm Nukie wrote: In the original Japanese, I believe Rei says " dame," which roughly translates into "I can't, I mustn't." I've seen it translated into english as simply "no," but the word chigau would be used instead in that case. For some reason Rei can't allow herself to fulfill her desire to "be one" with Shinji.

[]: Re: "You will not!"? Rei in episode 23             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Mon Feb 02, 2009 8:03 am ZapalacX"][quote="Nukie wrote: Chigau is more like "WROOOOONG!" but could also translate as "no".

"You will not!" *reverses AT field* What does she mean? That she will not allow the angel to harm Shinji? Also, she says: "If I leave unit 00, the AT field will cease to be... I will not let it." I morely understand that last one, but still, what does she mean by "You will not!"?
